organization.unit_tests: pytest -m 'not integration' - no external services required

quality_gates.coverage: 90% branch on kb_server/ + ingest/ (CI enforced PR-to-master)

git_workflow.branch_strategy: Feature branches for major phases, direct-to-main for small fixes

structure.phases: Numbered sequentially (1-16), decimal for urgent insertions (e.g., 12.1)

planning.planning_depth: Detailed upfront - CONTEXT.md, RESEARCH.md, multiple PLAN.md files per phase
planning.verification: UAT testing + VERIFICATION.md per phase, spot-checks before completion
planning.documentation: Comprehensive SUMMARY.md per plan, ROADMAP.md progress tracking

execution.parallelization: Wave-based parallel execution when safe (worktree isolation)
execution.checkpoint_handling: Human gates for decisions, auto-approved for verification when --auto
execution.quality_gates: Code quality, test coverage, documentation gates enforced at PR
execution.deployment_validation: Test on dev (WSL) + production (acemagic/LXC) before phase completion

tech_stack.deployment: Docker Compose, Kubernetes/Helm, systemd bare metal

key_features.core: MCP server exposing search_kb, list_documents, get_chunk, kb_stats tools
key_features.ingestion: Multi-format (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODF), chunking, classification
key_features.search: Hybrid (dense + sparse BM25), cross-encoder reranking, Prometheus metrics
key_features.deployment: Multi-target (bare metal, Docker, Kubernetes), health checks, monitoring dashboard

constraints.no_auth: Internal tool only, no authentication layer

communication.documentation_verbosity: Comprehensive but efficient - detailed where complex, brief where obvious
communication.error_handling: Graceful degradation with clear log messages, non-fatal warnings preferred
communication.progress_visibility: High - checkpoint heartbeats, wave summaries, UAT tracking

code_quality.type_hints: Encouraged but not strictly enforced (mypy lenient mode)
code_quality.error_handling: Try/except with explicit types, log before re-raise/degrade
code_quality.logging: Module-level 'log' variable, kb-mcp.{module} namespace, INFO for operations
code_quality.comments: English only, explain 'why' not 'what', section headers for complex modules

architecture.async_first: asyncio throughout, sync SQLite for registry/metadata only
architecture.separation_of_concerns: Two subsystems (ingest pipeline + query server), clear boundaries
architecture.configuration: .env file loaded at startup, sensible defaults, backward-compatible
architecture.observability: Prometheus metrics, health checks, query logging, structured logs

when_planning: Break complex phases into 3-6 plans with clear wave dependencies
Include TDD RED-GREEN cycles for behavior-adding features
Consider parallel execution safety (files_modified overlap detection)
Always include verification steps and success criteria
Reference existing patterns from completed phases (9-14 are good examples)
when_executing: Add comprehensive docstrings (Google-style) to all public functions/classes
Write English-only comments - no Portuguese (Phase 12 enforcement)
Emit structured logs at INFO level for operations, DEBUG for details
Commit atomically per task with conventional commit messages
Run pytest suite after changes, ensure 90%+ branch coverage maintained
when_debugging: Test on both dev (WSL) and production (acemagic) if deployment-related
Use systematic debugging skill - reproduce, isolate, fix, verify
Add regression tests to prevent recurrence
when_documenting: Update README.md, README.pt-BR.md, README.es.md in sync (Phase 13 pattern)
Keep docs/ folder up-to-date (OPERATIONS.md, TESTING.md, KUBERNETES.md, etc.)
Phase 13 sweep removed all FASE labels - don't reintroduce them in docs

common_patterns.lazy_loading: Cross-encoder loads on first predict() call, not at import
common_patterns.health_checks: Non-fatal warnings, server starts even when deps down
common_patterns.error_resilience: Log and continue, graceful degradation over hard failures
common_patterns.dual_server_startup: Health server (8080) + MCP server (8765) in one container via entrypoint script

recent_work: Phase 14: Health Dashboard (Grafana + Prometheus) - fixed docker-compose startup issues
Phase 13: Documentation refresh (README all languages, Spanish translation)
Phase 12: English comments & docstrings sweep (zero Portuguese enforcement)
work_session_context.next_up: Phase 15: PowerShell script opens ports for all subsystems (not yet planned)
known_issues: Phase 14 UAT has 4 pending tests (Helm validation, documentation checks) - non-blocking
Screenshots for Grafana dashboard deferred (manual capture required)
